title: tengine.gpu.lease.heartbeat v1
description: Periodic liveness signal from the current GPU lease holder. Source: /tengine/gpu. Carries queue observability (depth, in-flight job, ETA) so consumers can monitor scheduler backlog. The fencing_token must match the active grant; consumers reject heartbeats whose token is lower than the latest seen grant.

holder.description: Identity of the lease holder, source-URI style (e.g. 'tengine/interactive_pipeline_lab').

fencing_token.description: Fencing token of the lease this heartbeat belongs to; matches the token from tengine.gpu.lease.granted.

queue_depth.description: Number of jobs currently waiting in the GPU work queue (excludes the in-flight job).

current_job_id.description: Stable queue key of the job currently executing, or null if the queue is idle.

eta_hint_ms.description: Best-effort estimated milliseconds until the current job completes, or null when unknown/idle.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at which this heartbeat was emitted.
